refined_caption: The hospital bathroom appears to be unhygienic with visible dirt and grime. Urinals on the wall are also present.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see the state of the hospital bathroom, it was filthy and clearly hadn't been cleaned in a while. The dirt and grime were visible everywhere, which is unacceptable for a healthcare facility. This is a serious concern for patient health and safety.
voice_text: The bathroom in this hospital is disgusting, it's really dirty and hasn't been cleaned.
